---
title: "NW COE Monthly Update Meeting"
subtitle: "WAPHL Bioinformatics"
date: June 9, 2026
author:
  - name: Jared Johnson, PhD
    affiliation: Washington State Department of Health
format: 
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    mermaid-format: png
    theme: [default, css/nwpage.scss]
css:
  - css/styles.css
  - css/workflows.css
---

## WAPHL Bioinformatics Team

{{< include slides/team.html >}}

<small>**Contact:** <a href="mailto:waphl-bioinformatics@doh.wa.gov">waphl-bioinformatics@doh.wa.gov</a></small>

## Overview of Activities - **Bacteria**

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column .text-box}
- Most complex and established workflow
- Includes both <u>clinical</u> and <u>surveillance</u> workflows
  - **Surveillance** --> [CDC PHoeNIx](https://github.com/CDCgov/phoenix) / [Theiaprok](https://public-health-bacterial-genomics-theiagen.readthedocs.io/en/latest/theiaprok.html) + [BigBacter](https://waphl-bioinformatics.github.io/bigbacter-docs/)
  - **Clinical** --> [CDC NCHHSTP-DTBE-Varpipe-WGS](https://github.com/CDCgov/NCHHSTP-DTBE-Varpipe-WGS)
- BigBacter was developed at WAPHL for PGCoE!
:::

::: {.column}
```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 8
%%| fig-height: 4
%%| file: diagrams/bacteria.mmd
```
:::
::::

## Overview of Activities - **Viruses**
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column .text-box}
- Most streamlined workflow — all sequences run through a single pipeline, [VAPER](https://nw-page.github.io/vaper-docs/).
- Reference sets created periodically using [EPITOME](https://nw-page.github.io/epitome-docs/).
- VAPER and EPITOME developed at WAPHL for PGCoE!
- Viral workflow in production since August 2025
:::

::: {.column}

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 8
%%| fig-height: 3.5
%%| file: diagrams/viruses.mmd
```
:::
::::

## Overview of Activities - **Fungi**
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column .text-box}
- Currently use CDC [MycoSNP](https://github.com/CDCgov/mycosnp-nf) workflow
  - Requires deployment of multiple workflows: `Pre-MycoSNP`, `MycoSNP` (clade-wise)
- [CorgiSNPs](https://github.com/nw-page/corgisnps) workflow will simplify this to a single deployment
  - Developed at WAPHL for APHL / ARLN and will be hosted on the NW-PaGe site!
:::

:::{.column}
```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 8
%%| fig-height: 2
%%| file: diagrams/fungi.mmd
```
:::
::::

## Overview of Activities - **Submission**
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column .text-box}
- Transitioned away from CDC [TOSTADAS](https://github.com/CDCgov/tostadas) workflow after 2+ years of beta testing
- Now using [VirGo](https://github.com/DOH-KEW4303/virgo) for routine viral submission to NCBI
- VirGo was developed at WAPHL for PGCoE!
:::

::: {.column}
```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 8
%%| fig-height: 3
%%| file: diagrams/submission.mmd
```
:::
::::

## NW-PaGe Bioinformatics Workflows {#workflows}

{{< include slides/workflows.html >}}

:::{.text-box-wide}

All workflows are built in <img src="https://github.com/nextflow-io/trademark/blob/master/nextflow-icon.png?raw=true" style="height: 15px; width: 20px; object-fit: contain; vertical-align: middle"> Nextflow and largely follow <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nf-core/logos/master/nf-core-logos/nf-core-logo-square.png" style="height: 20px; width: 20px; object-fit: contain; vertical-align: middle"> nf-core community standards.

#### Development goals
- **Accessible & automated** — open-source, well-documented, and streamlined wherever possible
- **Validated outputs** — built for accuracy and precision
- **Built for routine use** — dependable day to day
- **Versatile** — largely species-agnostic

:::

## Workflow Accessibility

<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:2rem;">
  <img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/91/Octicons-mark-github.svg/960px-Octicons-mark-github.svg.png" style="height:175px; width:auto;">
      
  <img src="media/nw-page-full.png" style="height:200px; width:auto;">
</div>

:::{.text-box-wide}
**Goal:** Host all workflows on NW-PaGe web resources

- **Workfklow catalog** → on the NW-PaGe website ([nwpage.org](https://nwpage.org/tools-workflows))
- **Nextflow pipelines** → in the NW-PaGe GitHub <u>repos</u> ([github.com/NW-PaGe](https://github.com/NW-PaGe))
- **Documentation** → on GitHub <u>Pages</u>, styled with the [Just the Docs](https://just-the-docs.com/) Jekyll theme
:::

##
{{< include slides/vaper2.html >}}

## {#vaper background-iframe="slides/vaper.html" background-interactive="true"}

## {#epitome background-iframe="slides/epitome.html" background-interactive="true"}

## {#bigbacter background-iframe="slides/bigbacter.html"}

## {#corgisnps background-iframe="slides/corgisnps.html"}

## {#virgo background-iframe="slides/virgo.html" background-interactive="true"}

## Workflow Validation

:::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column width=60%}

:::: {.text-box style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
All _production-level_ bioinformatic workflows must be validated and approved by the **WAPHL Quality Assurance (QA)** team.

<br>

**Validated PGCoE Workflows:**

- VAPER + EPITOME (v1 and v2)
- CorgiSNPs (in process)
- BigBacter*

***BigBacter** was validated by the WA DOH Molecular Epidemiology team - read more [here](https://wwwnc.cdc.gov/eid/article/31/13/24-1227_article#).

::::

:::::

::::: {.column width=40%}

#### Validation Process

:::{.bordered}

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 4
%%| fig-height: 5
%%| file: diagrams/validation.mmd
```

:::

:::::

::::::

## Validation Report Example

:::{.bordered}
<iframe src="docs/validation_template.html" width="1000" height="500"></iframe>
:::

## Future Work
::::{.columns}
:::{.column .text-box}
- Complete validations (CorgiSNPs, BigBacter v2.0)
- Migrate workflows to [github.com/nw-page](https://github.com/nw-page) (BigBacter, VirGo)
- Complete documentation pages (CorgiSNPs, VirGo)
- Update workflow pages on [nw-page.org](https://www.nw-page.org)
:::

:::{.column}
<img src="media/future-work.png">
:::
::::
Publish workflow validation manuscripts!

## {background-image="media/questions.png" background-size="contain"}
